scripts.test:syntax: node --check tools/pi-harness.mjs && node --check tools/hermes/authority-review.mjs && node --check tools/hermes/authority-harness.mjs && node --check tools/test-lane.mjs && node --check tools/tests/authority.test.mjs && node --check tools/release-candidate-controller.mjs && node --check tools/tests/release-candidate.test.mjs && node --check tools/release-plan-generator.mjs && node --check tools/tests/release-plan.test.mjs && node --check tools/release-execution-simulator.mjs && node --check tools/tests/release-execution-simulator.test.mjs && node --check tools/manual-release-gate.mjs && node --check tools/tests/manual-release-gate.test.mjs && node --check tools/github-release-tag-controller.mjs && node --check tools/tests/github-release-tag-controller.test.mjs && node --check tools/stable-promotion-gate.mjs && node --check tools/tests/stable-promotion-gate.test.mjs
scripts.test:guards: node --no-deprecation tools/visual-gold-harness-lock.mjs && node --no-deprecation tools/frontend-visual-lock.mjs && node --no-deprecation tools/sddf-front-guard.mjs
scripts.test:quick: npm run test:syntax && npm run test:authority-unit && npm run test:release-unit && npm run test:release-plan-unit && npm run test:release-simulation-unit && npm run test:manual-release-gate-unit && npm run test:tag-controller-unit && npm run test:stable-gate-unit && npm run test:affected
scripts.test:postmerge: npm run test:quick && npm run test:guards
scripts.test:go: cd go-core && go test ./... && go build ./...
scripts.test:prepush: npm run test:postmerge && npm run test:full && npm run test:go
